phaseB.method: generalized eigenproblem H v=lam M v (M=h^3 I); fixed-asymptotic perturbations; QR-orthonormal analytic-symmetry deflation; matrix-free FD-HVP; multi-start LOBPCG-lite; battery = eps-scan + eigenvector save + overlap-with-gradient + Q_H-effect + direct quadratic-energy check.

re_relaxation.tool: production arrested-Newton (drive_production.py restart, unconstrained rescale_off) -- WORKING (HOLDS+CONVERGED, |Q|=0.9917 held, virial 0.998, no collapse)
re_relaxation.finding: gradnorm ~0.12 is an IRREDUCIBLE DISCRETIZATION FLOOR at 256^3 (h=0.047); the discrete FS hopfion cannot be relaxed to a true critical point at this resolution. Energy dropped only 0.13% over 400 steps.

hessian_at_noncritical_field.Q_H_effect: perturbing along the mode does NOT change Q_H (0.9917 stable)
hessian_at_noncritical_field.direct_quadratic_energy: E(n+t v)-E(n) matches 1/2 lam_euclid t^2 to ~10% (validates the HVP: it is a real negative-curvature direction of the discrete second variation)
hessian_at_noncritical_field.eps_scan: lam stable to 1e-4 across FD step 1e-3..1e-5

phaseB.verdict: UNRESOLVED -- LIMITED BY 256^3 DISCRETIZATION FLOOR. A converged localized negative Hessian mode exists but only at a NON-CRITICAL field (irreducible gradnorm ~0.12); a Hessian certifies (in)stability only at a critical point, unattainable here. The mode is orthogonal to the residual gradient, does not change Q_H, and its energy-decrease is consistent with a grid-scale/non-criticality artifact. Physics prior: the Q_H=1 Faddeev-Skyrme hopfion is a KNOWN stable soliton, so the true (continuum) minimizer is expected stable, but THIS numerics cannot confirm it at 256^3.
phaseB.to_definitively_close: finer grid (>=384^3) or higher-order/spectral discretization to LOWER the residual-gradient floor toward a true critical point, then recompute the Hessian; OR the coupled metric-carrier Hessian (separate later gate).
phaseB.gate: UNRESOLVED (discretization-floor-limited) -- NOT PASS, NOT FAIL_H3_INSTABILITY. GPU-zombie OOM that blocked earlier runs was cleared (30.8GB freed).
